title: Chuckit! Ultra Tug Dog Toy With Rubber Ball Tug Of War Interactive Fetch Toy for Dogs, Large
features: TUG & THROW DOG TOY: This colourful dog toy takes tug-of-war to the next level & is built for tough play. Compatible with large Chuckit! dog ball launchers
TUG TOY FOR LARGE DOGS: Developed to have high bounce, high buoyancy, visibility and durability. Rubber sides are gentle on your dog's mouth and make it easy to pick-up
INTERACTIVE TOY: Build a lasting bond with your dog and get a game of tug-of-war going
HIGH VISIBILITY: The orange and blue bright colours make it easy for you and your dog to spot when playing

CHUCKIT! FETCH TOYS: Chuckit! makes toys that enrich the human-animal bond and helps dogs and puppies stay engaged. Try our full line of ball launchers, bouncy balls, frisbees, indoor dog toys, glow toys and more
